name: Paul Walker
title: Last known photo of Paul Walker, taken on November 30, 2013, at a charity car show shortly before the fatal crash.
description: Paul Walker was photographed on November 30, 2013, at a charity event for his organization Reach Out Worldwide, held to benefit victims of Typhoon Hainan. After the event, Walker got into a Porsche Carrera GT driven by his friend Roger Rodas. The car lost control on a street in Valencia, California, struck a concrete lamp post and two trees, and burst into flames. Both Walker and Rodas were killed instantly. An investigation determined the car was traveling between 80-93 mph in a 45 mph zone. Walker was 40 years old.
bio: Paul Walker was an American actor best known for his role as Brian O'Conner in the "Fast & Furious" franchise. He was also a passionate marine biologist and humanitarian.
